title: Patent License Agreement
description: Patent license contract establishing royalty splits, territorial limits, and patent defense rights.
whatsCovered: License type: exclusive, non-exclusive, or co-exclusive
Royalty fees percentage and minimum annual sales caps
Territorial restrictions (countries where licensee can sell)
Responsibility for defending patents from infringers
whenToUse: Use this patent license contract when permitting another business to manufacture your patented hardware or use your patented methods.

clauses.heading: PATENT LICENSE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Patent License Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Patent Exclusivity Licenses
clauses.body: Patentee grants licensee a {license_type_select} for Patent: {patent_number}. Licensee shall pay royalties as outlined in the schedule.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
